summary: Iteration 51: MIS Lance+ Drilling Protocol Testing - 14/14 tests PASSED (100%). All MIS Lance+ drilling protocol features verified working correctly. Regression tests for Ankylos C/X, B&B Dental, and BioHorizons also passed.

frontend_issues.note: Frontend loads correctly. This is a React Native/Expo web app. Login page displays properly with form fields functional. Drilling protocol UI is implemented in CaseImplantPlanning.tsx with local protocol generation for MIS Lance+, Ankylos C/X, and B&B Dental systems.

critical_code_review_comments: Feature 1 (GET /api/drilling-protocols/available): PASS - MIS Lance+ listed with system_name='MIS LANCE+' and lengths=[8, 10, 11.5, 13, 16]
Feature 2 (D1 3.3mm with Countersink): PASS - Dense Bone Protocol includes Countersink step with note 'Dense cortical bone (D1) only'
Feature 3 (D1 5.0mm full sequence): PASS - 8 steps with Countersink and Final Drill 4.9mm
Feature 4 (D2 3.75mm full sequence): PASS - 5 steps, no Countersink, Final Drill 3.65mm
Feature 5 (D2 4.2mm full sequence): PASS - 6 steps, Final Drill 4.1mm
Feature 6 (D3 4.2mm under-preparation): PASS - Under-Preparation Protocol, 5 steps, stops at 3.65mm (skips 4.1mm)
Feature 7 (D4 5.0mm under-preparation): PASS - Under-Preparation Protocol, 6 steps, stops at 4.1mm (skips 4.9mm)
Feature 8 (D3 3.3mm under-preparation): PASS - 3 steps only (Marking, Pilot 2.4, Implant), skips 3.1mm
Feature 9 (Depth equals length): PASS - All lengths (8, 10, 11.5, 13, 16) verified - depth equals implant length (no offset)
Feature 10 (PDF export): PASS - Returns valid PDF content with correct content-type
Feature 11 (Insertion torque): PASS - 35-50 Ncm in notes
Feature 12 (Ankylos C/X regression): PASS - B Series, Yellow, 7 steps with Tap for D2
Feature 13 (B&B Dental 3P regression): PASS - Dense Bone Protocol with Countersink, depth=10.5 (length+0.5)
Feature 14 (BioHorizons generic regression): PASS - Generates drilling steps correctly

success_rate.frontend: N/A (React Native/Expo app - login page verified loading correctly)

seed_data_creation: No test data created - read-only tests on drilling protocol generation
context_for_next_testing_agent: MIS Lance+ drilling protocol fully implemented and tested. Key implementation details: DRILLING_PROTOCOLS['MIS|Lance +'] at line 4410 in server.py, _generate_mis_lance_protocol function at line 4416. Protocol rules: (1) Depth = Implant Length (no offset), (2) D1 gets full drilling + Countersink, (3) D2 gets full sequential drilling (no Countersink), (4) D3/D4 gets under-preparation (skip final drill for primary stability). Drill library: 1.9 (marking), 2.4 (pilot), 3.1, 3.65, 4.1, 4.9. Final drill mapping: 3.3→3.1, 3.75→3.65, 4.2→4.1, 5.0→4.9. Under-prep mapping: 3.3→2.4, 3.75→3.1, 4.2→3.65, 5.0→4.1. Insertion torque: 35-50 Ncm. Frontend has local protocol generation in CaseImplantPlanning.tsx (lines 54-90) matching backend logic.

tested_features.available_protocols_mis_lance: PASS - MIS Lance+ in available protocols with correct lengths
tested_features.d2_full_sequence: PASS - D2 has full sequential drilling without Countersink
tested_features.d3_d4_under_preparation: PASS - D3/D4 skip final drill for primary stability
tested_features.depth_equals_length: PASS - No offset (unlike B&B Dental which uses length+0.5)

tested_endpoints.GET /api/drilling-protocols/available: 200 - Returns MIS Lance+ with correct metadata
tested_endpoints.POST /api/drilling-protocols/generate: 200 - Generates correct protocol for all diameters, lengths, and bone densities
